testcase.name: test_update_company_supervisor_forbidden

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='sitemanager-30.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/company (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='sitemanager-30.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xf856c537b790>, 'Connection to sitemanager-30.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=15)'))
